allow: Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "import pydantic; print\(pydantic.__version__\)" 2>&1 && .venv/bin/python -c "import pydantic_settings; print\('pydantic-settings ok'\)" 2>&1 && .venv/bin/python -c "import structlog; print\('structlog ok'\)" 2>&1)

Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "import jose; print\('python-jose ok'\)" 2>&1; .venv/bin/python -c "import passlib; print\('passlib ok'\)" 2>&1; .venv/bin/python -c "import fastapi; print\('fastapi ok'\)" 2>&1; .venv/bin/python -c "import sqlalchemy; print\('sqlalchemy ok'\)" 2>&1)
Bash(DOCKER_HOST=unix:///var/run/docker.sock docker ps 2>/dev/null | grep -i post; /usr/local/bin/docker ps 2>/dev/null | grep -i post; docker ps -a 2>&1 | head -5)
Bash(DOCKER_HOST=unix:///var/run/docker.sock docker exec postgressql psql -U postgres -c "\\l" 2>&1 | grep cryptotrader || echo "cryptotrader DB not found")
Bash(DOCKER_HOST=unix:///var/run/docker.sock docker exec postgressql psql -U postgres -c "CREATE DATABASE cryptotrader;" 2>&1)
Bash(DOCKER_HOST=unix:///Users/rccpony/.docker/run/docker.sock docker exec postgressql psql -U postgres -c "CREATE DATABASE cryptotrader;" 2>&1)
Bash(DOCKER_HOST=unix:///Users/rccpony/.docker/run/docker.sock docker exec postgressql psql -U postgres -c "\\l" 2>&1 | head -15)
Bash(DOCKER_HOST=unix:///Users/rccpony/.docker/run/docker.sock docker exec postgressql psql -U postgres -d cryptotrader -c "SELECT 1;" 2>&1)
Bash(DOCKER_HOST=unix:///Users/rccpony/.docker/run/docker.sock docker exec postgressql psql -U postgres -d cryptotrader -c "\\dt" 2>&1)
